arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has made just the one change from the Crystal Palace side that beat West Ham, for the visit of Brentford - reintroducing Jefferson Lerma to the starting XI - while new signing Romain Esse also makes the matchday squad.

arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Fenerbahce have now joined the race to sign Sparta Prague midfielder Ángelo Preciado. The 26-year-old has been linked with a move to Everton and Brentford as both Premier League sides look to add to their squads before transfer deadline.
